title: Health Institutions Management Program Educational Objectives
content:
Health Institutions Management Program Educational Objectives

1-To provide basic management, organization, and practical skills in healthcare services and related sectors.

2-To develop innovative thinking, entrepreneurship, and teamwork skills, preparing graduates to adapt to professional practices.

3-To equip students with the competence to participate in business processes and carry out basic project and organizational tasks in public, private, and official institutions.
